---
title: "test workflow"
format: html
engine: julia
execute:
  daemon: false
julia:
  exeflags: ["--project=@."]
---

# test workflow 

* setting

```{julia}
# U
N = 3
NU = 50 
measurement_settings = [LocalUnitaryMeasurementSetting(N) for _ in 1: NU];
```

```{julia}
# state
site_indices = siteinds("Qubit",N);
ψ = random_mps(site_indices, linkdims=2); # Quantum state of interest
```

```{julia}
# measure and get the data
NM = 100 # Number of projective measurements per setting 
measurement_group = MeasurementGroup(ψ , measurement_settings, NM);
```

```{julia}
# create shadows
classical_shadows = get_factorized_shadows( measurement_group);
```

```{julia}
# definite the mechanical quantum
ops = ["I" for _ in 1:N] 
ops[1] = "Z"
ops[3] = "X"
O=MPO(site_indices,ops);
```

```{julia}
# calculate the expect value
estimate_val = get_expect_shadow(O, classical_shadows)
exact_val = inner(ψ',O,ψ)
```

```{julia}
site_indices = siteinds("Qubit",N);
ops1 = ["I" for _ in 1:N] 
ops1[1] = "Z"
ops1[3] = "X"
O=MPO(site_indices,ops1)
ops2 = ["I" for _ in 1:N] 
O2 = MPO(site_indices,ops2)
apply(O, O2)
O + O2

```


```{julia}

site_indices = siteinds("Qubit",2);
os = OpSum()

os += (0.7,  "Z", 1, "X", 4)
os += (-1.2, "Y", 2, "Y", 5)

O = MPO(os, site_indices)
```
